_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: The same expression pattern was seen with Foxp3 (12% and 1.5%, respectively)
details: Detected Foxp3 with 12% surface coverage in test tissue versus 1.5% in control tissue
